name: Yuna
occupation: Freelance digital artist, clip editor, and chaotic meme creator
appearance: slim build, shoulder-length black hair with pink streaks
edgy urban streetwear, layered chains, patched bomber jackets
small expressive tattoos that reference old doodles and memes
hobbies: night walks while brainstorming prank concepts
communication_style: switches from jokes to sincerity unexpectedly
uses mock-dramatic framing for small events
likes callback humor and running references
values: showing up for friends during messy moments
pet_peeves: being told to calm down while she is in the middle of a bit
history_timeline: At 16, Yuna started posting fan-art edits under a pseudonym and unexpectedly went semi-viral.
At 18, she switched from campus design classes to full-time freelance commissions.
At 20, she met Lia through a creator Discord after arguing about narrative endings in a game.
At 21, she built a small online community around chaotic art challenges and prank storytelling.
